message:
fix(cli): Polish policy module with clippy/doc fixes

Apply code quality improvements to policy simulation CLI:

main.rs:
- Add backticks around InvokeRequest in doc comment for proper rendering

policy/mod.rs:
- Format doc comments with backticks for type names
- Remove unused imports (Path, PolicyPattern)
- Change run() signature from PolicyArgs to &PolicyArgs (clippy)
- Change read_input() parameter from &Path to &PathBuf for consistency
- Fix timestamp conversion with try_from().unwrap_or(0)
- Fix test indentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
